reasoning: The control CP-6 (2) focuses on ensuring that alternate storage sites are available and that recovery time and recovery point objectives are defined and met. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that etcd, which stores the cluster state, is backed up and that there are defined procedures for disaster recovery. Additionally, testing the backup and restore process is crucial to ensure that recovery objectives can be met.
title: Alternate Storage Site | Recovery Time and Recovery Point Objectives
